items.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
items.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.

items.title: Italy’s Forests Larger Than Agriculture Land for the First Time Since the Middle Ages
items.summary: For the first time since the Middle Ages, Italy has more woodland than agricultural land. Forests now stretch across 60,000 square miles of the Italian Peninsula, overly concentrated in mountain areas…
